title: DeathPlaceholder
description: Shows the death count in TAB Scoreboard
body:
## **Death Placeholder**
This mod will allow to show the number of deaths in the TAB scoreboard.

## Requirements
TAB - [Download]([https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api](https://modrinth.com/plugin/tab-was-taken))

## How to install?

- Download Mod and Requirements.
- Place the mod in the Server
- Set "%player_death_count%" in you ScoreBoard config/tab/config.yml

## Manager
 - SrMaster - [Twitter](https://twitter.com/_SrMaster_)
